message:
fix: Preserve original arguments for self-update re-exec

Saves the original command-line arguments in ACFS_UPDATE_ARGS before
parsing begins. This is necessary for the self-update feature which
re-executes the script after updating itself—without this, the parsed
arguments would be lost after shift operations in the argument parser.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2091,6 +2091,9 @@ main() {
     # Ensure PATH includes user tool directories
     ensure_path
 
+    # Save original arguments before parsing (for re-exec after self-update)
+    local -a ACFS_UPDATE_ARGS=("$@")
+
     # Parse arguments
     while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
         case $1 in
